assets.name: lecture_04_frame_01.png
assets.rationale: Best readable shot of the matrix products used to identify the Pauli-matrix relation; partly obstructed, so it is safer as a reconstruction reference.

assets.name: lecture_04_frame_02.png
assets.rationale: Clear, stable board view of the spin-1/2 matrices and commutator structure, with better legibility than the neighboring near-duplicate frames.

assets.name: lecture_04_frame_03.png
assets.rationale: Best late-lecture reference for the orbital-angular-momentum spectrum sketch, with the axes, l=0 marking, and first plotted state visible enough to redraw faithfully.
